prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game character portrait
Primary request: square retro pixel art portrait of Fitchner au Barca (Ares) from the Ares lore
Subject: Small for a Gold — 6’0”, mid-forties, weathered. Brown hair graying at temples, close-cropped. Dull gold irises ringed with fatigue. Faded Peerless scar on left cheek. Worn dark tactical gear, never House finery.
Style/medium: hand-crafted 16-bit to 32-bit era pixel art, retro sci-fi portrait sprite, deliberate pixel clusters, crisp edges
Composition/framing: centered bust or waist-up portrait, facing camera or slight 3/4 turn, readable silhouette
Lighting/mood: moody sci-fi, restrained contrast, dramatic but readable
Color palette: use the character's described hair and eye colors as key palette anchors; keep costume colors faithful to lore
Constraints: square image; one character only; retro pixel art; crisp readable pixels; bust or waist-up portrait; simple atmospheric sci-fi background; no text; no labels; no watermark; no extra characters; no painterly rendering; no photorealism
Avoid: blurry pixels, anti-aliased mush, glossy 3D render, anime poster style, busy background, logo, text

Primary request: square retro pixel art portrait of Dancer (Epsilon Callo, Faran Mine) from the Ares lore
Subject: Early thirties. Compact even for a lowRed. Dark red-brown hair cropped close. Hands that look like a miner’s but move like something else — quick, precise, never restless. Small scar through left eyebrow from a clawDrill fragment. Epsilon clan tattoo partially obscured by a later burn scar.

Primary request: square retro pixel art portrait of Syla au Codovan from the Ares lore
Subject: 36. 6’4”, willowy rather than martial. Dark blonde hair in a severe knot. Peerless scar on right cheek, faded silver. Golden irises with slight amber warmth. Subject: Early seventies. 6’3”, lean and precise — nothing wasted. White hair loose to the collar. Pale amber-gold irises warm and deceptively gentle. Deep lines, old Peerless scar on right cheek. Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game character portrait
Primary request: square retro pixel art portrait of Davan o' Tharsis from the Ares lore
Subject: Twenty-nine. Lean, 5’8” for a highRed — slightly tall for his Color. Uses it by standing slightly wrong — shoulders rolled forward, spine curved — so he reads shorter than he is. Red-brown hair cut close on sides, longer on top, worn flat. Faint scar through his left eyebrow from a mag-clamp accident on a Tharsis atmospheric rig at nineteen. Eyes the color of old copper — warm at distance, cold up close, depending on what he’s decided about you. His forged sigil sits on the inside of his right wrist. He never touches it. Surface worker clothing: thermal underlayer, worn work jacket with Rotation 7 depot insignia on the left breast, mag-boots scuffed from three years of Ganymede deck plates. Nothing about him announces anything. That is the whole point.
Style/medium: hand-crafted 16-bit to 32-bit era pixel art, retro sci-fi portrait sprite, deliberate pixel clusters, crisp edges
